allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\);const files=[''src/lib/metadata.ts'',''src/app/layout.tsx'',''src/components/sections/Testimonials.tsx'',''src/app/[locale]/page.tsx''];files.forEach\(f=>{try{const o=fs.readFileSync\(f,''utf8''\);const r=o.replace\(/Electro Masters/g,''Elektro Master''\);if\(o!==r\){fs.writeFileSync\(f,r,''utf8''\);console.log\(''Updated ''+f\);}else{console.log\(''No changes: ''+f\);}}catch\(e\){console.log\(''Error: ''+f+'' ''+e.message\);}}\);")
